name: DigitaLogic
description: Small business providing guidance, support, and delivery of systems for automation, telecommunications, SCADA, and system integration of legacy and new systems.

name: McKim & Creed
description: Provides I&C and SCADA services including planning, design, programming, updating, repairing, and implementing in-plant and system-wide systems for utility providers.

name: RK&K
description: Integrates advanced instrumentation and control (I&C) systems, delivering reliable automation and monitoring solutions tailored to operational needs.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: RK&K is more than just an engineering firm, it's a family where everyone cares about each other.
I choose to work for RK&K because it is clear that employees are valued and engaged.
My coworkers often feel more like friends, and every day is different than the last.
A supportive and collaborative environment that makes me feel appreciated while pushing me to improve.

sentiment.summary: RK&K has exceptionally strong employee sentiment, with reviews consistently praising collaborative culture, family-like relationships, professional growth opportunities, and genuine appreciation for employees at all levels.
